SECTION 5 OF RESIDENTIAL TENANCY AGREEMENT MADE APPLICABLE TO PLAINTIFF PER THE SUBLEASE AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
